title: Twirrling
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Gualama-woswfg.jpg|thumb|right|180px|A Naboo monarch riding a gualama while twirrling.]]

Originating on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], '''twirrling''' was the name given to the sport practiced by nobles throughout the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. Participants in the hunt, riding domesticated [[Gualama/Legends|gualamas]], used trained [[twirrl]]s to seek out and recover prey, which included a variety of small mammals and waterfowl.

[[Unidentified Queen of Naboo (New Republic)|One]] of Naboo's [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Queens]] following the rise of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] participated in this activity while utilizing her own private herd.

==Behind the scenes==
The concept of aristocracy using birds of prey for hunting is very similar to the real life practice of [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Falconry Falconry], which uses birds such as [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Falcon falcons] and [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hawk hawks] to hunt small game. Though practiced in various forms throughout the world, falconry was an extremely popular sport with nobles in medieval Europe.
